unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: lunch(午餐) + time(时间) -> 吃午餐的时间就是午餐时间。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: They haven't had a holiday for ten years.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: holi(神圣的) + day(日子) -> 神圣的日子放假，所以是假期。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It's ages since we went to the cinema.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: cine(电影) + ma(妈) -> 妈妈带我去电影院。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The meeting has been going on since 9 o'clock.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: meet(会面，开会) + ing(名词后缀) -> 聚在一起会面，就是会议。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Do you still go swimming regularly?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: regular(常规的，有规律的) + ly(副词后缀) -> 有规律地，经常地。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: When did Anna arrive in London?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: ar(阿) + rive(河) -> 阿星游过大河，终于到达了对岸。
won(赢了) + der(得) -> 赢了之后还得琢磨(wonder)下一步怎么走。
d(地) + ry(热) -> 地很热(ry)所以很干燥。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: How long have you been doing your course?
unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: co(一起) + ur(你的) + se(色) -> 大家一起上你的色彩课程。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: How long is it since Mrs Hill died?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: d(大) + ie(矮) -> 又大又矮的东西死(die)得快。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: You can use in instead of for in negative sentences.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: in(在内) + stead(地方) + of -> 在那个地方代替，即代替。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: We often leave out for (but not usually in negative sentences).
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: leave(离开) + out(外面) -> 留在外面，就是漏掉、不包括。
